response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his background is heavily skewed towards JavaScript/TypeScript (Node.js, React, Ember) and Dlang, with limited C++ experience. His roles have primarily focused on full-stack web and mobile development, AI-agent infrastructure, and geospatial platforms, with no clear evidence of C++ development, STL usage, or industrial automation/cybersecurity exposure. The role requires strong C++ and STL proficiency, secure coding per IEC 62443, and industrial automation context, which are not reflected in his resume.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI)
Experience with DevOps practices, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship methodologies
concerns: Limited or no C++/STL experience, which is a core requirement for the role
No evidence of work with message brokers, multi-threading, or industrial automation protocols
Lacks exposure to IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle practices for the industrial sector
